_contextSnippet: NF1-MET cells produced extremely high levels of MET compared to NF1-P53 and NF1 cells, yet 5 nM capmatinib completely inhibited pMET in NF1-MET MPNST cells. Interestingly, MET was strongly activated with trametinib treatment in the NF1-MET and NF1 tumorgrafts
details: 5 nM capmatinib completely inhibited pMET in NF1-MET MPNST cells; showed strong MET activation with trametinib treatment in NF1-MET and NF1 tumorgrafts
